data.body: AC amendment: T8 (p95 benchmark harness) must write BENCHMARK_COMPLETE JSON to a discoverable output file for Story 7 documentation pickup. Acceptance criteria addition: --output=plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-benchmark-results.json when run in doc-generation mode. Story 7 (ad8f-3a8a) reads this file to include p95 data in the schema contract doc. Add: 'Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-benchmark.sh --iterations=10 --dry-run --output=/tmp/bench-test.json && test -f /tmp/bench-test.json && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open("/tmp/bench-test.json")); assert "stages" in d and "consumers" in d"'
